update_logs: 1.2.4: Resolved catastrophic boot loop and hang. Removed the InitializeLib() call which caused an immediate crash due to Microsoft/System V ABI mismatch. Deleted the entire assembly kernel shim layer and transitioned fully to direct C++ linkage to let the compiler safely handle ABI translations automatically. Fixed missing extern C declarations in kernel.cpp and stubs.cpp.

1.2.3: Critical Architecture Overhaul. Fixed deep CPU ABI mismatch (RCX/RDI), C++ name mangling, and blankUI struct signature mismatches. Added Hybrid Dual-Boot (Legacy BIOS + UEFI) with custom MBR stub. Added VirtualBox and VMware auto-configuring templates.

1.2.0: Major Architectural Teardown. Rewrote the entire OS in native C++ and injected a pure Assembly Kernel Core. Added native Zero-Key Auth to App Store and hardware-accelerated ASCII video decoding to blankBrowser.
1.1.4: Completely overhauled linter.ps1 with advanced OS dev guards to catch ABI mismatches, Makefile omissions, and strict UEFI text encoding rules.
1.1.2: Re-architected boot sequence to unify the kernel into the UEFI bootloader, implemented mtools virtual floppy booting, and added a detailed visual text-mode OOBE installer.
1.1.1: Implemented automated GitHub Release publishing and the custom vibe-coded linter (linter.ps1).
1.1.0: Added Audio subsystem, Brightness controls, WiFi/BT toggles, blankDrop (AirDrop/QuickShare), and a Chrome-equivalent rendering engine in blankBrowser.
1.0.1: Added blankC dependencies, App Store, and System Info module.
1.0.0: Initial release featuring BDRM, blankUI, and .bloe support.
